summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a magical night with Jerry’s stellar Terrapin Station and a raucous I Fought the Law finale.
review: The recording delivers crystal‑clear soundboard quality that lets listeners soak in a truly magical evening. Jerry Garcia is highlighted as fully engaged, nailing Terrapin Station, while the show closes on an energetic I Fought the Law amid an unforgettable Deadhead riot atmosphere.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed 5‑star review praises both performance and recording; high praise yields a top rating but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer explicitly calls the quality great; no technical issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Even with a chaotic riot incident, the set maintained momentum and ended on a high‑energy note.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as very engaged and on point, especially during Terrapin Station.
